calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Continued To Feb-13-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/13/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840. (212)
